facts.claim: Bergen is a city and municipality in the Vestland county on the west coast of Norway.
Bergen is the second-largest city in Norway after the capital, Oslo.

Bergen (.mw-parser-output .IPA-label-small{font-size:85%}.mw-parser-output .references .IPA-label-small,.mw-parser-output .infobox .IPA-label-small,.mw-parser-output .navbox .IPA-label-small{font-size:100%}Norwegian pronunciation: [ˈbæ̀rɡən] ⓘ, locally [ˈbæ̂ʁgæn]) is a city and municipality in the Vestland county on the west coast of Norway. Bergen is the second-largest city in Norway after the capital, Oslo.
